quests.title: Clear the Undercroft
quests.description: Goblin scouts have taken up residence in the abandoned undercroft beneath the old mill. Drive them out.

objectives.text: Recover Aldric's mentor's grimoire from the goblins
Find and clear the goblin treasury / deeper chambers
objectives.notes: Gruk fled wounded — treasury accessible, Gruk escaped via crawl hole

hooks.title: The Dobb Name
hooks.description: Aldric's mentor left a note in Gruk's chest: Gruk didn't hire the thieves. Someone named Dobb did — mentioned twice in Crestfall market. The mentor was investigating before he disappeared.
hooks.lead: Crestfall market, north of current location
